center.name: Ribeira de Iguape River
center.summary: Ribeira de Iguape River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Restinga tyrannulet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The restinga tyrannulet is found in southeastern Brazil along a narrow coastal band from the floodplain of the Ribeira River in southern São Paulo state south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The restinga tyrannulet is found in southeastern Brazil along a narrow coastal band from the floodplain of the Ribeira River in southern São Paulo state south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul
